ground_truth.title: 8 Digital Marketing Trends You Cannot Ignore in 2026
ground_truth.author: Kaitlyn Petro
ground_truth.main_content:
When it comes to marketing, we're used to hearing about the 'next big thing,' only to watch it fade away a few months later. But sometimes, what starts as a trend becomes the standard. That's why it's worth paying attention to these digital marketing trends. Digital marketing strategy is evolving fast. New tools, smarter buyers, and higher expectations are changing the game.

The eight digital marketing trends for 2026 are:

1. AI is becoming the foundation of modern marketing - In 2026, AI is no longer the shiny new tool. It's part of the everyday workflow for high-performing marketing teams, used to improve everything from content ideation and video editing to search insights, performance reporting, and customer support.

2. Search is evolving, and SEO must evolve with it - AI has triggered a major shift in how people search for and consume information online. Traditional search results are no longer the only destination. Tools like Google's Search Generative Experience (SGE) and ChatGPT's web-enabled answers are changing how users discover content.

3. Social media is becoming the new search engine - In 2026, social media is playing a different role in how people discover, evaluate, and trust brands. As generative search changes how users interact with Google, more buyers are turning to platforms like TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube to find information.

4. Short-form video is still dominating and evolving - Short-form video is no longer a trend, it's the standard for how millions of people consume content every day. These videos are typically less than 60 seconds, designed to capture attention immediately and deliver value fast.

5. Personalized, self-service experiences are raising the bar - Today's buyers expect your website to do the heavy lifting, offering a customized experience that answers their questions, recommends the right solution, and helps them decide when or if they want to talk to someone.

6. User-generated content and influencer partnerships are fueling authenticity - In a digital world where buyers are inundated with polished ads and brand promises, trust has become the real differentiator. HubSpot's latest research shows that influencer content sees 2x the engagement of traditional ads.

7. Immersive and visual search experiences are changing buyer expectations - The shift toward immersive, visual, and intuitive search experiences continues. Visual search tools like Google Lens and Pinterest Lens allow users to snap a photo of an object and instantly find it online.

8. Trust-First Tactics Are No Longer Optional - Modern buyers are more skeptical than ever. To earn trust, companies need to prioritize transparency, leverage social proof the right way, and adopt ethical data and privacy practices.

The most successful companies are deepening trust, delivering value, and aligning their teams around what really matters. Every trend worth following leads back to trust.
with: In 2026, AI is no longer the shiny new tool. Now, it's part of the everyday workflow for high-performing marketing teams.
Generative search creates summarized answers to your questions, often pulling from a range of sources without sending users to any specific website.
Short-form video is no longer a trend. It's the standard for how millions of people consume content every day.
HubSpot's latest research shows that influencer content sees 2x the engagement of traditional ads.
Trust is the foundation of any successful digital marketing strategy. The brands that buyers trust will always come out on top.
